reviews.review_description: Cant even open it cuz it said check version error but if they fix that issue and any others i havent seen ingame (cuz i cant open it:(       )i believe this game has a chance to be very good if the problem is fixed i will give 5 star rating :/
Like it but I can't play cause my left controller had really bad stick drift
Every time I play it it kicks me from the game
When I joined the game for the first time it says check game version

I got my quest 2 very recently and I really want to play this game I never have but when it starts loading it says network error but I’m connected to the internet I hope this gets fixed because I’ve never played this game and I Really want to. 😁

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback, it has been resolved, good luck, you can also add our discord: https://discord.gg/3xce6Tys，we can play together

reviews.review_description:
I played it earlier and it ran completely fine but whean I get on now it says “network error”

Otherwise 
The game has mass potential as being one of the first games like this to enter the quest market 
I am highly exited for the future of this games development 

The thing lacking right now is a player base 
And more tanks available 

Also a lil note for the devs for added realism: put commander pov view more higher up so it’s realistic and also make it so the scope is larger but the surroundings are all blacked out

Otherwise from that I see this game having high potential so keep on going devs, I hope this to be the next steel crew kind of game

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your reply, it has been fixed

reviews.review_description: Details says Q2 compatible, but not loading
